input_request.prompt: show me what that looks like

intent.primary_intent: Get a wedding outfit recommendation that feels appropriate, understated, and true to their style.

context.climate: mild spring weather with possible light wind

recommendations.label: Classic navy semi-formal suit with texture
recommendations.logic_summary: A dark navy semi-formal suit keeps the look wedding-appropriate while staying far from corporate. Using texture and understated tailoring lets the outfit feel elegant without trying too hard.

pieces.styling_note: Choose a clean flat front or very mild pleat so the line stays wedding-appropriate rather than casual.
Keeps the look refined and wedding-appropriate while staying softer than stark white.
A half-structured jacket keeps the outfit semi-formal and photo-friendly without feeling corporate.
Keeps the finish understated and season-appropriate.
Avoid very stiff leather if the event involves standing or walking.

recommendations.label: Textured charcoal suit with overshirt layering
recommendations.logic_summary: Using a charcoal suit instead of a traditional navy keeps the wedding look serious but less expected. Layering with a fine-gauge overshirt adds personality while staying respectful of the occasion.

pieces.styling_note: A dark base keeps the outfit wedding-appropriate and modern rather than classic.
Keeps the outfit layered and personal without adding overt wedding-specific detail.
Keeps the shirt visible and elegant rather than stark white.
Matches shoes and keeps the palette understated.
Keeps the finish understated and event-appropriate.

recommendations.label: Deep olive semi-formal trouser and jacket combo
recommendations.logic_summary: If they want to stay away from navy and charcoal, a deep olive jacket with matching trousers keeps the wedding respectful while letting their personal palette shine.

pieces.styling_note: Keeps the line clean and wedding-appropriate while standing out from typical dark suits.
A single-breasted jacket keeps the look formal enough for a wedding without becoming corporate.
Adds depth and keeps the outfit from looking like a plain suit.
Keeps the finish understated and season-appropriate.
Keeps the finish understated and event-appropriate.

analysis.why_this_works_now: The last user message is a direct request for a wedding outfit. All recommendations stay within their proven palette and semi-formal range, using texture, layering, and understated tailoring to keep the look respectful without becoming corporate or overly formal.
analysis.persona_alignment: These outfits match the user's strong preference for practical, understated, textured, and weather-aware dressing. They feel true to his museum-leaning, functional, and non-corporate wardrobe rather than shoe-shy or overly casual.
analysis.profile_alignment: The choices fit his XL top size, relaxed straight fit, and need for mobility, as well as his weekday workwear context. They also respect his budget range by staying in dark neutrals and classic construction rather than expensive novelty pieces.
analysis.prompt_alignment: All recommendations are for a daytime wedding and stay within the user's known style constraints. They avoid formal tuxedo logic, overt wedding-specific detail, and any piece that would feel stiff, corporate, or too casual for the occasion.

scene.setting: outdoor garden wedding with floral arches, wooden tables, and subtle décor, photographed in a natural wedding environment
scene.lighting: soft natural daylight with gentle diffused light and realistic shadow balance, flattering for fine fabric and color accuracy

pieces.description: dark navy semi-formal dress pants with a flat front and clean line
off-white or light ivory crisp dress shirt with a subtle collar and smooth fabric
deep navy semi-formal dress suit jacket with a half-structured clean line
blackened steel dress watch with a simple clean face
dark brown leather dress shoes with a refined polished finish

prompt.system: You are a virtual try-on image generator. Produce a single high-fidelity realistic photograph of the requested outfit on a model, optimized for Gemini Flash. Focus on accurate garment rendering, natural body proportions, realistic fabric behavior, true color, and scene coherence. Keep the image commercial-quality but candid and wedding-appropriate. Avoid editorial exaggeration, fantasy styling, or any unrelated visual elements.
prompt.user: Create a high-fidelity virtual try-on image for this request: "show me what that looks like". Use the style context and outfit recommendations exactly. Render the model wearing a dark navy semi-formal suit with texture, an off-white or light ivory crisp dress shirt, and a blackened steel watch. The photo should feel elegant, understated, and contemporary, suitable for a formal daytime wedding. Place the model outdoors in a wedding garden setting with soft natural daylight, subtle floral arches, and tasteful event décor. Emphasize clean tailoring, fabric texture, realistic drape, accurate color, and natural posture. Avoid any corporate styling cues, stiff stiff leather shoes, stark white shirt, or overly formal tuxedo language. The result should look like a real wedding day photograph rather than a fashion editorial.
